channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog poo, 11th April
item.description:
Large dog poo! Possibly even human!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Mill Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mixture of builders, gardening, general and wheelie bin in Hayles St. corner of Hedger St., 11th April
item.description:
Regular flytipping grot spot. Southwark Council please do something about this like a camera!!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elliott's Row, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste rubbish not dumped, 11th April
item.description:
The rubbish hasn’t been dumped all week and the garbage bins are overflowing but last night someone dumped their building waste including bathtubs. :(

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large mattress dumped on pavement on Corner between Cricklewood Broadway, walm lane and Manson road after little coop., 11th April
item.description:
Large mattress dumped on pavement on Corner between Cricklewood Broadway, walm lane and Manson road after little coop.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Bag of rubbish, 11th April
item.description:
2x bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterfall Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip - car parts, 11th April
item.description:
Random plastic parts/crates

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterfall Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa with piles of rubbish piled on top, 11th April
item.description:
This sofa has been left here for more then two weeks with more and more rubbish piled on top blocking the pathway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bullace Row, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left outside housing flats entrance and around steps of midfield way path, 11th April
item.description:
Litter left outside housing flat entrance for weeks and around midfield way path steps. Tied up dog waste bags are also left aeound as nowhere to deposit them. Please can more frequent street cleaning be done and a public litter bins be put in place around this site with signs to direct people.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Midfield Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 11th April
item.description:
Varios wood

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Samuel Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned green bin attracting fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Green top been has been dumped here for ages overflowing. Fly tipping next to it starting. Needs to be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coupland Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 11th April
item.description:
Every single week these bins are overflowing and trash is spilling absolutely everywhere, it's disgusting and starting to cause a rodent problem

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broxburn Court, South Ockendon
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rough camping, 11th April
item.description:
Someone is rough camping and using the immediate area as a toilet human waste in the bushes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dentons Wharf, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris after accident on Rope Street, 11th April
item.description:
It looks like a vehicle or some kind has crashed against the tree and there is a lot of debris on the road, including shards of glass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped low loader trolley ( retailer no lknger operating ), 11th April
item.description:
Dumped low loader trolley from Homebase ( no longer operating locally ) I have reported this before when it was dumped on the street by Clarion workers during a clearance of 93 Whippendell and you did not remove it. It is now reappeared back on the pavement blocking it and noenisnt passable. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead public tree, needs replacing, 11th April
item.description:
There used to be a tree here - needs replacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lodge Gardens, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of refuge bags left and spreading out, worsening the situation as time goes on., 11th April
item.description:
This pile of multiple refuse bags may have been there for approximately 4 days, the pile is spreading further into the street, perhaps by foxes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 253, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growing amount of flytipping, 11th April
item.description:
Please either Bromley or Clarion clear ASAP. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Chorleywood Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing bollard, 11th April
item.description:
Missing bollard at the junction of birkbeck and Pelham road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead deer on the side of the road, 11th April
item.description:
Dead deer on the side of the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping in the car park, 11th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped rubbish on the car park of laird house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcar Street, Camberwell, Greater London
